sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports anxiety regarding a recent positive hepatitis C diagnosis and surprise at the finding given his asymptomatic presentation. He denies a history of intravenous drug use or known hep C partners.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals a regular rhythm with a grade 2/6 systolic ejection murmur. Lungs are clear to auscultation. Liver panel shows elevated AST at 39 U/L, with normal albumin and bilirubin.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a confirmed diagnosis of hepatitis C and elevated liver enzyme levels.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order hepatitis C RNA and HCV genotype testing. Schedule a liver ultrasound with elastography to assess fibrosis. Refer to primary care physician for further management and potential medication discussion. Schedule a follow-up appointment in three weeks to review test results and discuss treatment options.
